validity.note: each floor is a one-sided (1-delta) bound, so a violation rate at or below delta is consistent with validity; cells overlap heavily so these are not independent tests and the rate is descriptive

wsr_gain_vs_hb.note: the betting bound's advantage on these cells is small and disappears at the smallest accept counts, where Hoeffding-Bentkus is sometimes tighter; WSR is kept because it is valid and never worse on average, not because it is worth a large gain

certified_gap_summary.verdict_after_multiplicity: NOT DETECTED: the label-free disagreement floor does not certify a strictly positive ensemble concept gap anywhere on RNP. Isolated uncorrected firings at per-cell level 0.80 (1/124 cells) do not survive a family-wise correction over the cells examined and are reported as null.
